raw_responses.title: Heinrich event (Wikipedia)
raw_responses.snippet: Source-domain: episodic Laurentide iceberg discharges; six IRD layers in marine cores; ~8 kyr cycle; Dansgaard-Oeschger coupling.

raw_responses.title: Heinrich events triggered by ocean forcing modulated by isostatic adjustment (Nature)
raw_responses.snippet: Source-domain: sub-surface ocean warming triggers; isostatic feedback modulates timing.

raw_responses.title: Subsurface ocean warming preceded Heinrich Events (Nature Comm)
raw_responses.snippet: Foraminifera-based reconstructions show rapid subsurface warming precedes each Heinrich Event.

raw_responses.title: Context-aware Continual Pretraining for LLMs (ICLR/NeurIPS submission)
raw_responses.snippet: Mitigates catastrophic forgetting in continual pretraining; parameters updated to assimilate new info can abruptly lose proficiency on prior domains.

raw_responses.title: Mechanistic Analysis of Catastrophic Forgetting During Continual Fine-tuning
raw_responses.snippet: Three mechanisms: gradient interference in attention weights, representational drift in intermediate layers, loss-landscape flattening around prior-task minima.

raw_responses.title: Spurious Forgetting in Continual Learning of LMs
raw_responses.snippet: Performance drops often reflect decline in task alignment, not true knowledge loss.

raw_responses.title: FIT: Defying Catastrophic Forgetting in Continual LLM Unlearning
raw_responses.snippet: Sequential deletion requests cause severe utility degradation; addresses continual unlearning.

raw_responses.title: Mitigating Catastrophic Forgetting in Target Language Adaptation via Source-Shielded Updates
raw_responses.snippet: Catastrophic forgetting hinders linguistic-diversity expansion of instruct LLMs.
